description_long: This oven features a rectangular, boxy form with a predominantly black exterior and large transparent glass panels on the front and sides. The front face includes a wide, horizontally-oriented window, allowing visibility into the oven's interior. The oven doors appear to open outward from the center, with glass panels framed by black structural elements, providing easy access to the cooking chamber. The top surface is flat and bordered by raised edges, possibly for stability or stacking. The oven's design is modern and minimalistic, with no visible control panel or branding. The overall construction suggests a robust appliance suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern, black oven with large glass doors and a wide front window, featuring a minimalistic and robust design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide glass window and the solid black frame, with the oven doors closed.
description_view_1: Side or open view displaying both glass doors swung outward, revealing the spacious interior and glass side panels.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually similar to the front, with a solid black panel and no window or controls.
description_view_3: Opposite side or open view, again showing both glass doors open and the interior accessible from the front.
attribute_control_panel_design: No visible control panel is present on any face of the oven; the surfaces are smooth and unadorned, with no knobs, buttons, touchscreens, or display elements apparent.
attribute_door_handle_type: No distinct external handle is visible; the doors appear to be frameless glass panels with integrated or edge-pull opening, flush with the oven's surface for a sleek, modern look.
attribute_window_presence: present; a large, horizontally-oriented rectangular window is set into the front doors, spanning most of the width and centrally placed.
